prestazioni: Replace the stock C30A 3.0L V6 (90° DOHC, 24-valve, 270 hp @ 7,100 RPM, 210 lb-ft @ 5,300 RPM) with a fully built **Toda Racing C30A Stroker Kit** (3.2L displacement, forged internals, billet crank, Carrillo rods, JE pistons, 12.5:1 compression) paired with **Toda Racing Type-R camshafts** (280° duration, 11.5mm lift) and **Toda Racing titanium valves** for high-RPM stability up to 9,000 RPM.

Install a **GReddy T88-34D turbocharger** (68mm compressor, 62mm turbine, 1.25 A/R housing) with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold** (equal-length, 304-grade, ceramic-coated) and **HKS GT-SS wastegate** (44mm, 1.5-bar spring) feeding into a **PWR 4-row front-mount intercooler** (1,200 CFM airflow, 3.5-inch core thickness) and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** (adjustable dual-stage). Supporting mods include a **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and **AEM Infinity 7 ECU** (custom C30A base map with flex-fuel capability).

Upgrade the stock 5-speed manual transmission with a **PPG straight-cut dog engagement gearset** (1st: 2.92, 2nd: 2.15, 3rd: 1.63, 4th: 1.26, 5th: 1.00) and **OS Giken twin-plate clutch** (260mm, 800 kg clamping force) paired with a **Toda Racing aluminum flywheel** (4.5kg). The differential is replaced with a **KAAZ 1.5-way limited-slip differential** (25-spline, carbon fiber preload plates) and reinforced with a **Toda Racing transmission mount** (polyurethane, 75A durometer).
estetica: Replace the stock body panels with a **Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit** (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) paired with a **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (dual vented, 3.5kg weight reduction) and **Seibon Carbon fiber trunk** (integrated ducktail spoiler). The rear diffuser is a **Voltex Type-5** (3D carbon fiber, 3-inch diffuser tunnels) with **custom titanium exhaust tips** (80mm, dual-wall, polished finish).

Install a **J's Racing full titanium bolt-on underpanel kit** (front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser mounts) with **J's Racing titanium hood pins** (aircraft-grade, quick-release) and **Rays Volk Racing TE37SL wheels** (17x9 +35 front, 17x10.5 +40 rear, 6kg each, matte bronze finish) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 tires** (235/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear).

Interior upgrades include **Recaro SPG-K seats** (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather, 6-point Schroth harnesses) with **Toda Racing titanium seat sliders**, a **Momo Prototipo Evo steering wheel** (350mm, suede, quick-release hub), and a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster** (oil pressure, oil temp, boost, wideband AFR, mounted on a **custom titanium A-pillar pod**). The stock shift knob is replaced with a **Toda Racing titanium shift knob** (short throw, 200g weight) and **custom titanium shift boot frame** (anodized blue).
